reviews.review_description:
No idea what to do. I collect the glowing colored rocks and shoot d*mn nearcendless UFOs after that. Then something happens and I collect rocks again. Now I'm standing there as meteorites are hitting my planet. Shooting them stops them, but this never ends, and there's no way to get more than half of them because you can't see them all and the controls are horrible...
There's no real point to the game and none of its fun nor feels good...

Can't recommend it in it's current state, nor am I sure the core game is worth building on.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We are working to continue developing and improving our game.
